---
id: platform-agents-create-run
title: "Create agent run"
description: "Execute an agent run. Set `stream` to true to receive server-sent events; otherwise the response contains the final agent messages."
sidebar_label: "Create agent run"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/platform-api/glean-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create agent run"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/agents/{agent_id}/runs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Execute an agent run. Set `stream` to true to receive server-sent events; otherwise the response contains the final agent messages.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
